current_readiness.label: wp_scaffold_ready_needs_pcg_capture
next_needs: Regenerate PCG on all four L_WP_* pillars (ISM > 0).
Capture hero_l_wp_* and pcg_l_wp_* plates from Cam_Hero_Establishing.
Capture shader and Niagara breakdown plates into renders.breakdown.
Promote strongest shader families into dedicated material breakdown cards.

capture_slots.title: Universal Master MeshBlend graph plate
capture_slots.capture: Annotated Material Editor screenshot or beauty-plus-graph pair for M_Master_Toon_Universal with MeshBlend controls visible.
capture_slots.proves: Layered stylized environment materials can be explained as a production system, not just a beauty render.

capture_slots.title: Space Cathedral celestial shader plate
capture_slots.capture: MI_Show_CelestialNebula material instance, starmap texture source, parallax nebula response, and one beauty crop.
capture_slots.proves: NASA starmap source work supports the Space Cathedral pillar with readable cosmic material language.

capture_slots.title: Sakura Niagara ambience plate
capture_slots.capture: Niagara system viewport with particle settings, petal drift read, and final in-scene ambience crop.
capture_slots.proves: The Sakura Dream world has motion language and atmospheric VFX support beyond static composition.

capture_slots.title: ZEN_SHRINE_AXIS PCG route proof
capture_slots.capture: PCG graph or debug overlay paired with the heatmap and a final route beauty shot.
capture_slots.proves: Torii, Sando, Kairo, and Haiden route logic can control procedural dressing without harming traversal clarity.

capture_slots.title: Baroque Escher ornament material plate
capture_slots.capture: MI_Baroque_EscherOrnament and gilded filigree variants as swatches, close-up trims, and one world-context crop.
capture_slots.proves: The Escher/math concept is tied to actual material families and modular environment ornamentation.

capture_slots.title: Nikki-style surface polish plate
capture_slots.capture: Iridescence, sheen, sparkle, and soft pastel grading comparison across Sakura material instances.
capture_slots.proves: The surface direction is intentionally fashion-fantasy and Infold-adjacent while remaining original.

capture_slots.title: SakuraDream WP pillar hero
capture_slots.capture: Cam_Hero_Establishing beauty plate after meadow PCG + MeshTerrain block-in.
capture_slots.proves: Owned Sakura pillar reads as warm stylized environment, not ZenForest derivative.

capture_slots.title: SakuraDream meadow PCG proof
capture_slots.capture: PCG_MeadowBloom volume with ISM count overlay or debug view + hero crop.
capture_slots.proves: Meadow falloff dressing works on WP pillar terrain.

capture_slots.title: SpaceCathedral WP pillar hero
capture_slots.capture: Cam_Hero_Establishing with cool volumetric shafts and Escher architectural rhythm.
capture_slots.proves: Space Cathedral pillar has distinct cosmic-architectural identity.

capture_slots.title: SpaceCathedral Escher PCG proof
capture_slots.capture: PCG_EscherRelativityRoom scatter with graph or overlay + beauty crop.
capture_slots.proves: Escher graph dresses cathedral-scale space without breaking readability.

capture_slots.title: BaroqueGrotto WP pillar hero
capture_slots.capture: Enclosed wet-rock mood with mist and localized emissive accents.
capture_slots.proves: Grotto pillar reads enclosed and biolume-friendly.

capture_slots.title: BaroqueGrotto strata PCG proof
capture_slots.capture: RockScatter + WallMoss volumes with ISM proof and hero crop.
capture_slots.proves: Cave/strata dressing baseline on grotto terrain.

capture_slots.title: CosmicOrrery WP pillar hero
capture_slots.capture: Night cosmic palette with MI_Show_CelestialNebula terrain and controlled sparkle.
capture_slots.proves: Cosmic pillar uses owned starmap/nebula language.

capture_slots.title: CosmicOrrery orbit scatter proof
capture_slots.capture: PCG_Cosmic_OrbitScatter radial distribution + emissive point read.

acceptance_checks: Every capture should include one beauty read and one production-proof read when possible.
Use filenames from preferred_filename or keep the id as the filename slug.
Update portfolio_package.json so renders.breakdown, renders.pcg, or renders.materials consumes the new assets.
Rerun tools/ingest_unreal_portfolio.ps1 after new captures land.
Rerun tools/build_unreal_capture_brief.ps1 if the intake metadata changes.
